## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

Commands run:

```bash
bash -n install.sh
bash -n new-api.sh
shellcheck install.sh new-api.sh
```

## Compatibility

- Linux distribution:
- CPU architecture:
- systemd tested: yes/no

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include secrets, logs with tokens, database files, or backups.
- [ ] This change stays within installer, manager, service, documentation, or GitHub community scope.
- [ ] This change does not modify upstream New API source code.
- [ ] This change does not add public operation, resale, proxy/VPN, bypass, evasion, abuse, or illegal-use functionality.
